# Casais Fleet Intelligence - AI Context

## Project Overview
A professional-grade PWA system for construction fleet management, designed for the Casais Group. It bridges field IoT/NFC data with Procore ERP.

## Key Technical Details
- **Architecture**: PWA (Frontend) + Cloud Functions (Backend) + Firebase (Database) + Arduino/Raspberry Pi (Hardware).
- **Frontend Stack**: React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, Zustand.
- **Backend Stack**: Firebase Functions v2 (Node.js), Firestore.
- **Integration**: Bi-directional sync with Procore API.

## 🎨 Visual Identity & Design Guidelines (CRITICAL for Design AIs)
- **Primary Brand Color**: Casais Blue `#005EB8`. 
- **Aesthetic**: Premium Industrial. Clean, elite, high-contrast. 
- **Style**: Subtle use of glassmorphism, modern typography (Outfit/Inter), and smooth micro-animations.
- **Color Constraint**: ❌ **NEVER USE PURPLE/VIOLET**. This is a project-specific ban. 
- **UX Goal**: Simplicity for operators in the field (Big buttons, high contrast) combined with density for managers/admins.

## Responsive Targets
- **Mobile SE**: 320px (Strict layout stability).
- **Smartphone**: 390px (Standard mobile view).
- **Tablet**: 768px+ (Field supervisor view).
- **Desktop**: Full analytics dashboard.

## Folder Structure Core
- `/Frontend_App/dashboard`: The React PWA.
- `/.agent`: System rules and agent specialization (Gemini & Claude).
- `/docs`: Technical ADRs and Operations manuals.

---
*Created by Gemini (Architect) for external AI orchestration.*
